<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Elements; use Spatie\Html\BaseElement; /** * @method static forIf(bool $condition, string|null $for) * @method static forIfNotNull(bool $condition, string|null $for) * @method static forUnless(bool $condition, string|null $for) */ class Label extends BaseElement { protected $tag = 'label'; /** * @param string|null $for * * @return static */ public function for($for) { return $this->attribute('for', $for); } }
